slide_plan.title: AI-Enabled Threats

category_analysis.overview: 3 sources identified in ai enabled threats this reporting period, with 0 classified as must-read priority.

top_insights.insight: Anthropic introduced Claude Mythos Preview, a new large language model.

resolved_evidence.title: Anthropic: Claude Mythos identified 10,000+ software flaws
resolved_evidence.short_summary: Anthropic's Claude Mythos LLM, part of Project Glasswing, has autonomously identified over 10,000 high- or critical-severity software vulnerabilities and can create exploits. This demonstrates a significant AI capability for automated vulnerability discovery and exploitation, impacting software vendors and security researchers.
key_facts: Anthropic introduced Claude Mythos Preview, a new large language model.
Claude Mythos can autonomously find zero-day vulnerabilities.
Claude Mythos can create exploits for identified vulnerabilities.
Project Glasswing partners include Amazon Web Services, Apple, Broadcom, Cisco, CrowdStrike, and Google.
Claude Mythos identified over 10,000 high- or critical-severity vulnerabilities.

citations.title: Anthropic: Claude Mythos identified 10,000+ software flaws

top_insights.insight: Megalodon malware infected thousands of GitHub repositories.

resolved_evidence.title: Feeding Frenzy: 'Megalodon' Malware Infects Thousands of GitHub Repos
resolved_evidence.evidence_card_title: Feeding Frenzy: 'Megalodon' Malware Infects Thousands of GitHub Repos
resolved_evidence.short_summary: Megalodon malware infected thousands of GitHub repositories in a six-hour campaign, stealing credentials and developer secrets. The attack highlights the vulnerability of GitHub repositories to malicious commits. This incident has significant AI security implications as it could be used to compromise AI models and data.
key_facts: Megalodon malware infected thousands of GitHub repositories.
The campaign stole credentials and developer secrets.
The attack occurred over a six-hour period.
resolved_evidence.why_it_matters: Relevant to the AI threat landscape — see source for details.

citations.title: Feeding Frenzy: 'Megalodon' Malware Infects Thousands of GitHub Repos

top_insights.insight: Charter Communications suffered a data breach.

resolved_evidence.title: Charter confirms data breach after ShinyHunters extortion threat
resolved_evidence.evidence_card_title: Charter confirms data breach after ShinyHunters extortion threat
resolved_evidence.short_summary: Charter Communications confirmed a data breach after ShinyHunters threatened to leak stolen data unless a ransom was paid. The breach has significant AI security implications as it may involve AI-enabled phishing or other AI-assisted attacks. Charter Communications is the affected party.
key_facts: Charter Communications suffered a data breach.
ShinyHunters threatened to leak stolen data unless a ransom is paid.
resolved_evidence.why_it_matters: Relevant to the AI threat landscape — see source for details.

citations.title: Charter confirms data breach after ShinyHunters extortion threat
